CONTENT.Club career: Petković started his career at Bokelj. After gaining promotion with them in 2014, he signed with FK Zeta. After one season with Zeta, he joined Lovćen on a two-year contract.On 29 August 2016, Petković signed a three-year contract with the Hungarian team MTK Budapest. After spending one season in Hungary, he signed a three-year contract with FC Lorient in July 2017.
CONTENT.International career: Until 2014 he featured regularly for Montenegro U21. On 26 May 2014, he made his Montenegro debut in a 0–0 draw against Iran.

SUMMARY: Danijel Petković (Serbian Cyrillic: Данијел Петковић, pronounced [dǎnijel pêtkoʋitɕ]; born on 25 May 1993) is a Montenegrin professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Hungarian club Kisvárda and the Montenegro national team.
